content.en:
Time passed slowly, and the demon seed Lin Yuan gradually became completely desperate.

Because, he could feel that Ye Tian was about to control the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Once Ye Tian controlled the Eternal Demon Pillar a little bit, even if he couldn't exert too much of the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, he could completely kill him.

He wanted to escape, but Ye Tian's five replica bodies desperately trapped him, not giving him any hope of escaping.

After another period of time, Ye Tian finally left a mark inside the Eternal Demon Pillar, this mark was very weak, far inferior to the mark left by the original Demon Seed Linyuan, and the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar that he could mobilize was naturally far less than the power extracted by the original Demon Seed Linyuan.

Demon Seed Lin Yuan is here to control the Eternal Demon Pillar, which is enough to deal with the Eternal Realm God Realm like the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods, he is naturally far from being able to do it, but the power mobilized is enough to threaten the Demon Seed Lin Yuan.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian began to mobilize the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, because he had just refined and controlled a little Eternal Demon Pillar, the power extracted was very small, and it was very difficult to control, but he still succeeded in mobilizing it.

The power of the Eternal Demon Pillar turned into an Eternal Demon Pillar phantom, and it directly bombarded the trapped Demon Seed Linyuan~.

Bang!!!!

The demon seed Lin Yuan was hit by the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, and he was immediately injured.

Next, Ye Tian urged the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar again and again, but this kind of urging was forcibly urged, and it would also cause damage to the body, and even damage to the Eternal Dao Species.

This is also the reason why the demon seed is in the abyss at the beginning, and it can't always urge the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Ye Tian was the same, but he didn't care about this replica body, and continued to forcibly urge.

Moreover, while urging him, he also tried to combine it with the Eternal Dao Secret Technique to burst out with more powerful attack power.

Under the attack again and again, the body of the demon seed Linyuan cracked, and it was not far from falling.

Subsequently.

The demon seed Lin Yuan went crazy and began to burn the eternal demon seed, wanting to kill Ye Tian.

However, from beginning to end, he didn't fail to do so, but only severely damaged Ye Tian's two replica bodies.

In the end, the demon seed Lin Yuan was killed by the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, and the body of the demon seed was shattered into countless pieces, and the demon seed was turned into ashes.

"The Demon Seed Lin Yuan is dead!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Even an Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse like the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods didn't have anything to do with the Demon Seed Linyuan, and was killed by him.

If this news spreads, I am afraid that the entire Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance will be shocked, and even after the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods knows about it, it is estimated that he will have to come back.

But Ye Tian will not let this news get out, he will keep this secret.

"The next two replica bodies are guarding the Eternal Demon Pillar here, one copy body is responsible for refining the Eternal Demon Pillar, and the other is responsible for driving away other demon species!"

Ye Tian planned.

After all, he is not a demon seed, and other demon seeds will still attack him.

It's just that this is the territory of the demon seed Linyuan, and the other demon seeds dare not approach, but without the deterrent aura of the demon seed Linyuan, the other demon seeds will definitely come over to interfere with him, so it is also a good thing to have one more copy body.

After that, he dismantled the other duplicated bodies, leaving the two duplicated bodies behind.

In the years that followed, he used the Eternal Demon Pillar to strengthen his Eternal Dao Seed.

And after the initial refining of the Eternal Demon Pillar, the growth speed of the Eternal Dao Seed was much faster.

"At this rate, my Eternal Dao Seed will grow rapidly, and when it grows to the limit, it will be difficult to grow, and then solidify the Eternal Dao Seed. Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated that the Eternal Demon Pillar would help strengthen the Eternal Dao Species, but it would not help to solidify the Eternal Dao Species.

Otherwise, the Demon Seed Abyss would not be unable to break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Of course, there is also a possibility, that is, the demon seed has no follow-up path, and the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm is the limit, but this possibility should not exist.

If the demon seed did not have the existence of the Eternal Realm God Realm, then the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance would not be so jealous of the demon seed, and the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods would not be so jealous of the demon seed, and the demon seed would not even be able to continue to exist at all.

"There must be a lot of demon seeds in the Eternal Realm, and there are even many Demon Seeds in the Eternal Realm God Realm, but the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance is too remote here, and there are no strong people, so there are no Demon Seeds in the Eternal Realm God Realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't think too much about it, but worked hard to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar until one day he was able to completely refine the Eternal Demon Pillar.

However, the Demon Seed Linyuan has been refining for endless years, and he has not succeeded in refining it completely, unless he can break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, coupled with the long years, he can hope to completely refine the Eternal Demon Pillar!

The years passed.

Without the Demon Seed Abyss, it was almost impossible for a Demon Seed Rebellion to occur, plus Ye Tian would occasionally clean up a few Demon Seeds, which greatly reduced the number of Demon Seeds in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss.

However, he wouldn't clean it all up, otherwise the other Eternal Dao realms would come in and find out that something was wrong.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating and found that an Eternal Dao Realm had passed through the first line of defense and entered the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss.

"It's him!"

"Xuan Patrol Dao Master!"

Ye Tian knew that this Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse, who was cultivating a primary Eternal Dao Seed, and the Eternal Dao Body was in the Immortal Dao Realm, and his strength was not weak, and he was not lightly injured in the process of blocking the Demon Seed last time.

And.

Ye Tian sensed that the corrupt aura on the other party's body was very heavy this time, although the other party tried his best to suppress it, he also covered it with some kind of eternal primordial treasure.

But Ye Tian and the demon seed have been killing in the abyss for a long time, and he is too keen to perceive the aura of the demon seed, so he can sense it.

"Xuan Xun Dao mainly can't control the demon seed, in this case, he doesn't destroy his eternal Dao seed, but enters the abyss of the No. 1 demon seed, I'm afraid he will take the initiative to transform the demon seed!" Ye Tian guessed.

Really.

Ye Tian didn't guess wrong, not long after, the Xuan Xun Dao Master was transformed into a demon seed in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss.

"Why bother!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

If there is really an enemy, it is better to hide in a place similar to the Void Domain, self-destruct the Eternal Dao Species, even if it is just an ordinary Eternal Dao Realm cultivation, it is still invincible there, and the life is very comfortable, and the enemy will most likely not be found.

However, if they have extremely strong strength and status, and then let their strength be reduced many times in an instant, and they are still hiding, they are not happy, they would rather turn into demon seeds and fight for that one in a hundred million hopes.

This is the case with the Demon Seed Linyuan, and the same is true for the Xuan Xun Dao Master.

Ye Tian didn't go to kill the Xuan Patrol Dao Master, a mere demon seed with an eternal Dao body, and there was no threat to him.
